description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a landscaped garden featuring trees, shrubs, and a paved driveway. The structure is rectangular, with large windows and sliding glass doors that open onto a patio and green spaces. The front yard includes a walkway leading to the main entrance, flanked by manicured lawns and decorative plants. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private backyard, partially enclosed by fencing and bordered by mature trees. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light-colored plaster and wood paneling, giving it a contemporary appearance. The layout suggests multiple rooms with open-plan living spaces and direct access to outdoor areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens on all sides. The exterior features a mix of light plaster and wood paneling, with open access to patios and green spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, walkway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, flat roof, and fenced backyard with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private backyard, patio area, and large windows opening to the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, fencing, and additional garden space with mature trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
